mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_participants ( user_uuid, room_no, camera_status, mic_status, active, joined_at, left_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userUuid}, #{roomNo}, COALESCE(#{cameraStatus}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{micStatus}, FALSE), TRUE, NOW(), NULL, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (user_uuid, room_no) DO UPDATE SET active = TRUE, joined_at = NOW(), left_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE room_participants SET active = TRUE, joined_at = NOW(), left_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE room_no = #{roomNo} AND user_uuid = #{userUuid}
UPDATE room_participants SET active = FALSE, left_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE room_no = #{roomNo} AND user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND active = TRUE
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_uuid AS userUuid, u.user_name AS userName, u.user_email AS userEmail, u.user_profile_image AS profileImage, CASE WHEN r.user_uuid = u.user_uuid THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS owner, rp.camera_status AS cameraStatus, rp.mic_status AS micStatus, rp.joined_at AS joinedAt, COALESCE(sl.total_seconds, 0) AS todayStudySeconds FROM room_participants rp INNER JOIN users u ON rp.user_uuid = u.user_uuid INNER JOIN rooms r ON rp.room_no = r.room_no LEFT JOIN study_logs sl ON sl.user_uuid = u.user_uuid AND sl.study_date = CURRENT_DATE WHERE rp.room_no = #{roomNo} AND rp.active = TRUE ORDER BY CASE WHEN r.user_uuid = u.user_uuid THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, rp.joined_at ASC
